metadata.name: Issue DMCA Takedown for Pirated Content

description: A movie studio discovers a full-length copy of their new film has been illegally uploaded to YouTube. An agent must issue a DMCA takedown notice.

nodes.task_description: Identify the URL of the pirated video on YouTube.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the exact URL of the infringing content.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the uploader is not a legitimate licensee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the uploader has no rights to the content.

nodes.task_description: Submit a formal DMCA takedown request through YouTube's content protection portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully fills out and submits the DMCA form.
